description_long: This object is an ornate, ceremonial horn crafted from a combination of metal and what appears to be a natural animal horn. The wide end is adorned with intricate metalwork, including floral and geometric patterns, and is mounted on a decorative base featuring a sculpted figure kneeling and supporting the horn. The body of the horn transitions from a silvery metallic section to a darker, natural horn material, with additional metal bands and embellishments encircling its length. The narrow end tapers smoothly and is left unadorned, contrasting with the elaborate detailing at the bell. The base is oval and textured, providing stability and further decorative appeal. This object is likely intended for display or ceremonial use rather than practical musical performance.
description: An ornate ceremonial horn with intricate metalwork, a natural horn body, and a decorative base featuring a kneeling figure. The wide bell is highly embellished, while the narrow end is plain and smooth.
description_view_0: The horn is seen from the side, showcasing the elaborate metalwork at the bell, the transition to the darker horn material, and the kneeling figure on the base.
description_view_1: A frontal view highlights the circular, ornate bell opening and the symmetry of the decorative bands, with the kneeling figure partially visible below.
description_view_2: The opposite side view reveals the full length of the horn, the detailed base, and the smooth, unadorned tip, mirroring the embellishments seen in view 0.
description_view_3: A top-down view into the bell emphasizes the open, flared mouth and the intricate rim, with the base and supporting figure visible below.
attribute_bell_flare: Wide and abrupt, with ornate, decorative metalwork at the rim.
attribute_valve_configuration: No visible valves; the horn is a continuous tube without piston or rotary valves.
attribute_leadpipe_curvature: Gently curved, following the natural arc of the horn.
attribute_tuning_slide_location: No visible tuning slide; the horn appears to be a single, uninterrupted piece.
